title: RECREATION DISTRICT - 211info
text: BEND PARK AND RECREATION DISTRICT RECREATION DISTRICT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various recreation opportunities, such as sports, fitness, crafts, and music, senior centers, and swimming pools. Youth programs include topics such as art, science, technology, and nature. Provides preschool, after-school care, no-school-day child care, and Kids’ Corner, parent-child activity activities are available as well. Operates and maintains developed and undeveloped parkland, including natural areas, hiking trails, and the following facilities: Bend Senior Center, Juniper Swim and Fitness Center, Larkspur Community Center, The Pavilion, and The Art Station. Also operates a variety of sports complexes, including a skate park, ice skating and roller rink, and dog off-leash areas. 799 SW Columbia Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: -Unrestricted. Activities and classes are available for all ages, with special programs for young children, youth, individuals with disabilities, and older adults. -After-school care/no school child care: K-5th grade -Youth enrichment programs: Ages 3-17 Hours: Varies by activity. Visit website for the event calendar. After-school care: End of school day-5:30pm; no school child care 7am-5:30pm on select days Email (541) 389-7275 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 389-7275 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service; income-based scholarships are available DOCUMENTS: Proof of income or current eligibility/award letter for SNAP, TANF, or OHP if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: City of Bend SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports General Recreational Activities/Sports * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions General Recreational Activities/Sports * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Preschools Public Parks Recreation Centers Swimming Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND PARK AND RECREATION DISTRICT
